textPlain: Keep rooting for thieves. Ngnix is bad software that was stolen.

eBay confused the 17 year old me back in 2007 when their listings were powered by a dll file.    cgi.ebay.co.uk/ws/eBayISAPI.dll

It wasn't for many years later that I discovered knowledge about CGI.
Just curious, who did they steal from? Or which code base it is stolen from?
I never did understand why this path/file structure was exposed.
